hero.title: Quote Forge
hero.description: Discover bundled quotes, explore ideas, and save favorites in your browser.

flow.title: Browse → Copy → Favorite
steps: Copy quotes and save browser-local favorites

differences.title: A focused quote collection in your browser
differences.description: Quote Forge keeps bundled quotes, fast discovery, formatted copy, and local favorites together.

items.title: Browse
items.description: Search quotes, authors, categories, and keywords in real time.

items.title: Copy
items.description: Copy a quote and its author in a clean format.

items.title: Favorite
items.description: Save useful quotes as favorites in this browser.

feel.title: Move directly from discovery to a saved quote
feel.description: The Forge keeps search, categories, random discovery, copy, and favorite actions visible.

items.title: Discover quickly
items.description: Search the collection or jump to a random visible quote.

items.title: Copy instantly
items.description: Copy quote text and author attribution to the clipboard.

items.title: Keep favorites
items.description: Save favorite quotes locally for this browser.

audiences.title: Who uses Quote Forge
audiences.description: Useful for anyone looking for a focused collection of memorable ideas.

items.title: Writers
items.description: Find memorable ideas and references while writing.

items.title: Creators
items.description: Copy attributed quotes for inspiration and creative planning.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Browse and save meaningful quotes in one local collection.

resourceSection.title: Quote collection essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to discover, copy, and keep useful quotes.

items.title: Focused discovery
items.description: Search collection fields, filter categories, or choose a random quote.

items.title: Local favorites
items.description: Store only favorite quote IDs in this browser.

groupedSection.title: Browse and keep useful quotes
groupedSection.description: Use one browser-only workflow for quote discovery and local favorites.

items.name: Real-time search

technicalSection.title: Designed for browser quote discovery
technicalSection.description: Quote Forge follows the shared Ansiversa browser-first reference architecture.
items: Bundled browser quote data with local favorites.
